problems.text: Ian has more candy than Michael but less than Athena. Who has the most candy?

problems.text: Anusha is reading a book. On the first day she reads 10 pages. On the second day she reads 4 more pages than the first day. How many pages did Anusha read on the second day?
Emily notices there are 5 more clouds today than there were yesterday. If there are 20 clouds today, how many clouds were there yesterday?
A teacher is writing problems on a piece of paper. What is the answer to this question?

problems.text: Arthur is playing with his toy cars. He counts 2 red cars, 3 orange cars, 1 yellow car, 6 green cars, 5 blue cars, and 4 purple cars. How many cars does Arthur have altogether?
